## Meeting Purpose

[Evaluate GrowthX as a partner for scaling ZoomInfo's AI-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=188.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**ZoomInfo's Challenge:** Despite mature internal AI capabilities, content production is a bottleneck. The goal is to scale from 6–10 pieces/week to daily publishing across the main site and child brands (e.g., NeverBounce, Comparably).](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** An end-to-end service combining proprietary AI workflows with expert oversight (e.g., former TechCrunch editor). The model is a two-phase engagement: an 8-week strategy sprint to build a brand-specific knowledge base, followed by a 12-month execution phase targeting daily publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**Key Differentiator:** GrowthX's ability to execute programmatic content (e.g., the Lovable template gallery) was a major discovery. This capability could solve ZoomInfo's challenge of scaling high-value demand offers beyond traditional ebooks, especially for SMBs.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
  - [**Next Steps:** Molly and Tyler will have a follow-up call to explore the programmatic use case. Marcel (GrowthX CEO) may join to explain the Lovable project's execution.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)

## Topics

### ZoomInfo's Content Scaling Challenge

  - [**Goal:** Shift from a reactive "play catch-up" mode to an offensive, high-volume publishing strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [**Current State:**](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Mature internal AI capabilities (custom agents, LLMs) but limited by scale.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
      - [Production: 6–10 new pieces/week on the main blog.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
      - [Content needs are unmet for the `zoominfo.com` website and child brands (NeverBounce, Comparably, gtm.ai).](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [**Need:** A partner to enable rapid, bulk content creation and updates across all properties.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)

### GrowthX's AI-Powered Content Service

  - [**Model:** Combines proprietary AI workflows with human experts.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [**AI:** Automates research, drafting, fact-checking, and SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Experts:** Guide strategy, manage workflows, and provide quality control.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [**Engagement Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint (8 weeks):** GrowthX builds a brand-specific knowledge base by ingesting ZoomInfo's resources (ICP, style guides). This knowledge base feeds the AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
    2.  [**Growth Execution (12 months):** GrowthX targets daily publishing, handling all content creation, staging, and CMS publishing (with ZoomInfo's approval).](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Programmatic Content: A Key Opportunity

  - [**Discovery:** The Lovable template gallery project revealed GrowthX's programmatic capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1627.0)
      - [**Execution:** GrowthX integrated with Lovable's product API to programmatically generate a large volume of SEO-optimized template pages.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**Significance:** This capability could solve ZoomInfo's challenge of scaling high-value demand offers (e.g., templates, tools) beyond traditional content formats like ebooks, especially for the SMB audience.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tyler:** Email Molly with available times for a follow-up call.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)
  - [**Molly & Tyler:** Discuss the programmatic content use case in detail.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [**Marcel (GrowthX CEO):** May join the call to explain the Lovable project's execution.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1829.0)
  - [**Molly:** Consider inviting a demand-side colleague to the follow-up.](https://fathom.video/share/4mryE5DXhYPpuYg8rQkjD77CqVjgJADi?tab=summary&timestamp=1868.0)
